name: Fish Drop
author: Poki
description: Fish Drop is a merging game where your goal is to combine all kinds of identical fish! When two fish of the same type collide, they merge into a bigger fish. Keep merging to create the largest pufferfish possible! If you love fish and enjoy merge games, this one's just for you. How big can your pufferfish grow? Dive in and find out! How to play Fish Drop? Move Fish: Drag your finger to move the fish, or drag with the mouse. Drop Fish: Release your finger to drop it in the cup, or left-click to release. Who created Fish Drop? Fish Drop is created by AdaBella Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Fish Drop for free? You can play Fish Drop for free on Poki. Can I play Fish Drop on mobile devices and desktop? Fish Drop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
